title: Ivy's Invisible Ice Cream
synopsis: Little Ivy discovers a magical ice cream truck that serves invisible treats, leading to hilarious mishaps as she tries to eat something she cannot see.

pages.text: Ivy heard a funny jingling song outside. She ran to the window with her teddy bear. A sparkly purple ice cream truck was parked in her yard!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes peering out a bright yellow window, mouth agape in wonder, holding a fluffy teddy bear. A magical purple ice cream truck with rainbow sparkles sits in a candy-green yard.
illustration.alt: Ivy looking amazed out the window at a magical ice cream truck

pages.text: The ice cream man had a wiggly mustache and a hat covered in stars. 'Special invisible ice cream today!' he called out in a booming voice.

illustration.description: A jolly ice cream vendor with an enormous curly mustache and star-covered hat waving from his purple truck. Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes stands nearby with comically wide eyes and raised eyebrows.
illustration.alt: The magical ice cream vendor announcing his invisible treats to surprised Ivy

pages.text: Ivy giggled. Invisible ice cream? That sounded silly! She skipped outside to see what invisible ice cream looked like.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes skipping with exaggerated bouncy steps toward the truck, arms swinging wildly, with a huge grin and squinted eyes from laughing so hard.
illustration.alt: Ivy skipping excitedly toward the ice cream truck

pages.text: The ice cream man handed Ivy a cone. But there was nothing on top! 'It's strawberry flavor,' he winked. 'Very tasty!'

illustration.description: The vendor handing an empty cone to Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes. Ivy's eyes are comically crossed looking at the empty cone, her mouth forming a perfect 'O' shape of confusion.
illustration.alt: Ivy receiving an empty ice cream cone and looking puzzled

pages.text: Ivy stared at the empty cone. She turned it upside down and shook it. Nothing fell out! She put her nose close and sniffed.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes holding the cone upside down with stretched arms, her head tilted at an impossible angle, tongue sticking out slightly as she concentrates on sniffing the air.
illustration.alt: Ivy examining the empty cone by turning it upside down and sniffing

pages.text: Ivy took a big lick of the cone. Her tongue went way out! She licked and licked the air where ice cream should be.

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes with her tongue stretched out impossibly long like rubber, licking the air above the empty cone. Her eyes are squeezed shut in concentration, cheeks puffed out comically.
illustration.alt: Ivy licking the air above her empty cone with an extremely long tongue

pages.text: Suddenly, Ivy tasted something wonderful! Sweet strawberry ice cream was melting on her tongue! The invisible ice cream was real!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes with her eyes popped wide open in amazement, mouth stretched in a huge smile with pink strawberry ice cream magically appearing around her lips and cheeks.
illustration.alt: Ivy's delighted expression as she tastes the magical invisible ice cream

pages.text: 'More please!' Ivy laughed, jumping up and down. The ice cream man gave her another invisible scoop. This one was chocolate!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes bouncing high in the air with arms stretched up, hair flying wildly. The smiling vendor pretends to scoop invisible ice cream, with magical sparkles around the empty cone.
illustration.alt: Ivy jumping excitedly as the vendor adds another invisible scoop

pages.text: Ivy ate her invisible ice cream with the biggest smile ever. Sometimes the best treats are the ones you can't see!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes sitting cross-legged on bright green grass, holding the cone with both hands, her smile so wide it takes up half her face. Rainbow sparkles dance around her as she enjoys her magical treat.
illustration.alt: Happy Ivy enjoying her magical invisible ice cream in the yard

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: What color was the magical ice cream truck?
questions.explanation: The ice cream truck was sparkly purple and very magical looking!

questions.question: What was special about the ice cream?
questions.explanation: The ice cream was invisible, which means you couldn't see it but could still taste it!

questions.question: What flavor did Ivy taste first?
questions.explanation: The ice cream man said it was strawberry flavor, and that's what Ivy tasted!

questions.question: How did Ivy feel about the invisible ice cream?
questions.explanation: Ivy was very happy and excited! She even asked for more invisible ice cream.
